fund_name: Invesco India PSU Equity Fund Direct Growth
text: Invesco India PSU Equity Fund Direct Growth is a Equity mutual fund scheme from Invesco Mutual Fund with a risk level rated as Very High. Latest NAV as of 2026-07-23 is ₹77.13.

fund_name: Invesco India PSU Equity Fund Direct Growth
text: 1Y returns: 0.93%. 3Y annualised returns: 22.42%. 5Y annualised returns: 22.29%. Since inception returns: 11.34%. Compared with category 1Y average 5.81%. category 3Y average 28.28%. category 5Y average 29.79%.

fund_name: Invesco India PSU Equity Fund Direct Growth
text: Risk level: Very High. Standard deviation: 24.12. Sharpe ratio: 0.82. Alpha: -1.52. Beta: 0.96.

fund_name: Invesco India PSU Equity Fund Direct Growth
text: Expense ratio is 0.97%. Exit load policy: Exit load for units in excess of 10% of the investment, 1% will be charged for redemption within 1 year. Minimum SIP investment is ₹100. Minimum lump-sum investment is ₹1000. Taxation: If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.
